'''Eryl Besa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who, in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], participated in the [[Mission to Myrkr]].

==Biography==
Eryl's father had been a space racer, and she had been born in the middle of one of his races, in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]. She later participated in many of his races, learning to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Instinctive astrogation|discover where]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] she was at any given moment. She later joined the [[New Jedi Order]].

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Eryl joined the [[Myrkr strike team]]. Due to her ability to know exactly what part of space she was in at any given time, her role in the mission was to let the team know when they were at [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]]. During the mission, she and [[Raynar Thul]] became close, until Eryl died when she was hit in the face with [[razor bug]]s on Myrkr.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{Mo}}
